'''zadhala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:averah|averah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:averah|averah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadhala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhælæth|zædhælæth]] || [[word:zædhælæj|zædhælæj]] || [[word:zædhælæsh|zædhælæsh]] || [[word:zædhælæ|zædhælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhadhalath|zadhadhalath]] || [[word:zadhadhalaj|zadhadhalaj]] || [[word:zadhadhalash|zadhadhalash]] || [[word:zadhadhala|zadhadhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhalath|zadhalath]] || [[word:zadhalaj|zadhalaj]] || [[word:zadhalash|zadhalash]] || [[word:zadhala|zadhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhaflath|zadhaflath]] || [[word:zadhaflaj|zadhaflaj]] || [[word:zadhaflash|zadhaflash]] || [[word:zadhaflaf|zadhaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhalatha|zadhalatha]] || [[word:zadhalaja|zadhalaja]] || [[word:zadhalasha|zadhalasha]] || [[word:zadhalaka|zadhalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhalath|zadhalath]] || [[word:zadhalaj|zadhalaj]] || [[word:zadhalash|zadhalash]] || [[word:zadhala|zadhala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhalathal|zadhalathal]] || [[word:zadhalajal|zadhalajal]] || [[word:zadhalashal|zadhalashal]] || [[word:zadhalakal|zadhalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhalathatha|zadhalathatha]] || [[word:zadhalajaja|zadhalajaja]] || [[word:zadhalashasha|zadhalashasha]] || [[word:zadhalaka|zadhalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhalathan|zadhalathan]] || [[word:zadhalajan|zadhalajan]] || [[word:zadhalashan|zadhalashan]] || [[word:zadhalakan|zadhalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhalathaoro|zadhalathaoro]] || [[word:zadhalajaoro|zadhalajaoro]] || [[word:zadhalashaoro|zadhalashaoro]] || [[word:zadhalakaoro|zadhalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
